Line: 84
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: link

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'


### Fix 2
Line: 307
Rule [family:Dropdown]:
## Dropdown Family Migration

Target structure (correct v6 composition):
```jsx
  <Dropdown activeItemId={...} activeMenu={...} containsDrilldown={...} containsFlyout={...} drilldownItemPath={...} drilledInMenus={...} focusTimeoutDelay={...} id={...}>
    <DropdownList isAriaMultiselectable={...}>
      <DropdownItem actions={...} component={...} description={...} direction={...} download={...} drilldownMenu={...} flyoutMenu={...} hasCheckbox={...}>
        <DropdownList />
        <Dropdown />
      </DropdownItem>
    </DropdownList>
    <DropdownGroup innerRef={...} label={...} labelHeadingLevel={...} titleId={...} />
  </Dropdown>
```

Props that stay on <Dropdown>: activeItemId, activeMenu, containsDrilldown, containsFlyout, drilldownItemPath, drilledInMenus, focusTimeoutDelay, id, innerRef, isMenuDrilledIn, isNavFlyout, isOpen, isPlain, isRootMenu, isScrollable, maxMenuHeight, menuHeight, onActionClick, onDrillIn, onDrillOut, onGetMenuHeight, onOpenChange, onOpenChangeKeys, onSelect, onToggleKeydown, ouiaId, ouiaSafe, parentMenu, popperProps, role, selected, shouldFocusFirstItemOnOpen, shouldFocusToggleOnSelect, shouldPreventScrollOnItemFocus, toggle, zIndex

Add imports: DropdownGroup, DropdownItem, DropdownList from '@patternfly/react-core'

  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: DropdownItemProps['value']) => void
  onSelect: (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: string | number) => void -> (event?: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent>, value?: DropdownItemProps['value']) => void
  popperProps: DropdownPopperProps -> PopperOptions
  popperProps: DropdownPopperProps -> PopperOptions

### Fix 3
Line: 84
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Popover

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   83        >
   84          <Button variant="link" isInline>
   85            {current}

```

### Fix 4
Line: 273
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-menutoggle]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <MenuToggle> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <MenuToggle> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <MenuToggle variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <MenuToggle> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <MenuToggle><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</MenuToggle>
  After:  <MenuToggle icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</MenuToggle>

Incident context:
  componentName: MenuToggle
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: MenuToggle
Prop: icon

### Fix 5

Rule [sd-test-dropdown-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Dropdown is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Dropdown renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Dropdown may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Incident context:

- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/odf-console/source/packages/shared/src/dashboards/utilization-card/ConsumerPopover.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
I'll start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me analyze each fix:

**Fix 1** (Line 84): `Button variant="link"` — The type change just adds `'stateful'` to the union. The value `"link"` is still valid. No change needed.

**Fix 2** (Line 307): Dropdown family migration. Two incidents:
- Line 311: `DropdownList` requires `DropdownItem` children — currently `{dropdownItems}` which already contains `<DropdownItem>` elements (lines 197-203). This is fine structurally.
- Line 307: `onSelect` type changed from `(event?, value?: string | number)` to `(event?, value?: DropdownItemProps['value'])`. The `onDropdownChange` callback (line 210-222) uses `event.currentTarget.id` to find the selected consumer. In PF v6, the `onSelect` callback receives `(event, value)` where `value` comes from the `DropdownItem`'s `value` prop (not `id`). I need to update the callback signature and add `value` props to `DropdownItem`, and use the value parameter.

**Fix 3** (Line 84): Icon children-to-prop for Button — Looking at the Button on line 84, it contains `{current}` which is a string, not an icon. No icon to move. No change needed.

**Fix 4** (Line 273): Icon children-to-prop for MenuToggle — Looking at lines 273-285, the MenuToggle already has `icon={<CaretDownIcon />}` on line 277 (already migrated). The text content is still children. No change needed.

**Fix 5** (Line 14): Dropdown behavioral changes from Popper `appendTo` default change. This is a test advisory. The file is not a test file, and this is about runtime behavior changes. No code change needed for the source file itself.

**Fix 6** (Line 20): Popover behavioral changes from Popper `appendTo` default change. Same as Fix 5 — advisory for tests. No code change needed.

Now let me focus on Fix 2 more carefully. The `onSelect` signature changed. In v6, `onSelect` receives `(event, value)` where `value` is the `DropdownItemProps['value']`. Currently, the code uses `event.currentTarget.id` to get the selected item reference. I need to:

1. Add `value` prop to each `<DropdownItem>` matching the `id` (which is `ref`)
2. Update `onDropdownChange` to use the `value` parameter from `onSelect` instead of `event.currentTarget.id`
Now let me verify the final file looks correct:

The file looks correct. Let me verify all the changes are sound by reviewing the logic:

1. **`DropdownItem` on line 197** now has `value={ref}` — this passes the reference model string as the `value` prop, which v6's `onSelect` will deliver as the second argument.

2. **`onDropdownChange` on lines 210-220** — Updated signature from `(event: React.SyntheticEvent<HTMLDivElement>)` to `(_event, value)` matching v6's `onSelect` type. Removed `event.preventDefault()` and `event.stopPropagation()` (no longer needed — v6 Dropdown handles this internally). Changed from `event?.currentTarget?.id` to `value` for finding the consumer. Changed `setDropdownOpen((o) => !o)` to `setDropdownOpen(false)` since selecting an item should close the dropdown.

3. **Button on line 84** — `{current}` is a string, not an icon. No icon migration needed.

4. **MenuToggle on line 271-283** — Already has `icon={<CaretDownIcon />}` on line 275. Already migrated.

5. **No companion test files** were listed, so no test changes needed.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (line 84)
**No change needed.** The value `"link"` is still valid in the new type union. The only change is the addition of `'stateful'` as a new option.

### Fix 2 — Dropdown family migration (lines 307, 311)
**Applied.** Two changes made:
1. **`DropdownItem` (line 197):** Added `value={ref}` prop so the v6 `onSelect` callback receives the reference model string as the `value` parameter.
2. **`onDropdownChange` (lines 210-220):** Updated the callback signature from `(event: React.SyntheticEvent<HTMLDivElement>)` to `(_event: React.MouseEvent<Element, MouseEvent> | undefined, value: string | number | undefined)` matching v6's `onSelect` type. Replaced `event?.currentTarget?.id` with the `value` parameter. Removed `event.preventDefault()`/`event.stopPropagation()` (handled by v6 Dropdown internally). Changed `setDropdownOpen((o) => !o)` to `setDropdownOpen(false)` for correct close-on-select behavior.

### Fix 3 — Icon children-to-prop for Button (line 84)
**No change needed.** The Button's children (`{current}`) is a string value, not an icon element from `@patternfly/react-icons`. No icon migration applies.

### Fix 4 — Icon children-to-prop for MenuToggle (line 273)
**Already applied.** The `MenuToggle` already has `icon={<CaretDownIcon />}` as a prop (line 275). The `CaretDownIcon` is not among the children — the children are the text label. No further change needed.

### Fix 5 — Dropdown transitive behavioral changes (line 14)
**No change needed.** This is a test advisory about Popper's `appendTo` default change. This is a source component file, not a test file. No companion test files were listed.

### Fix 6 — Popover transitive behavioral changes (line 20)
**No change needed.** Same as Fix 5 — test advisory only. No test files to update.

chunks.response:
The file looks correct. Let me verify all the changes are sound by reviewing the logic:

1. **`DropdownItem` on line 197** now has `value={ref}` — this passes the reference model string as the `value` prop, which v6's `onSelect` will deliver as the second argument.
